---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for Scrollback
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or limitation are you running into?

## Proposed solution

What would you like Scrollback to do?

## Alternatives considered

What have you tried instead?

## Scope notes

Scrollback currently focuses on X/Twitter capture, RSS ingestion, search,
reading, media storage, export/query APIs, and optional AI enrichment for a
self-hosted archive. If your request is outside that scope, explain why it
still belongs in the project.
